testcase.name: net.lichen.coap_keys.store.list_endpoint_truncates_with_valid_array_count
testcase.error:
Loading Zephyr default modules (Zephyr base). -- Application: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/lichen/tests/coap_keys -- CMake version: 3.30.0 -- Found Python3: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/venv/bin/python (found suitable version "3.9.25", minimum required is "3.8") found components: Interpreter -- Cache files will be written to: /home/ec2-user/.cache/zephyr -- Zephyr version: 3.7.0 (/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/zephyr) -- Found west (found suitable version "1.5.0", minimum required is "0.14.0") -- Board: native_sim, qualifiers: native -- Found host-tools: zephyr 0.16.8 (/mnt/lichen-zephyr/zephyr-sdk-0.16.8) -- Found toolchain: host (gcc/ld) -- Found Dtc: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/zephyr-sdk-0.16.8/sysroots/aarch64-pokysdk-linux/usr/bin/dtc (found suitable version "1.6.0", minimum required is "1.4.6") -- Found BOARD.dts: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/zephyr/boards/native/native_sim/native_sim.dts -- Generated zephyr.dts: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/twister-out/native_sim/net.lichen.coap_keys.store/zephyr/zephyr.dts -- Generated devicetree_generated.h: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/twister-out/native_sim/net.lichen.coap_keys.store/zephyr/include/generated/zephyr/devicetree_generated.h -- Including generated dts.cmake file: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/twister-out/native_sim/net.lichen.coap_keys.store/zephyr/dts.cmake
/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/lichen/tests/coap_keys/prj.conf:17: warning: attempt to assign the value 'y' to the undefined symbol LICHEN
/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/lichen/tests/coap_keys/prj.conf:18: warning: attempt to assign the value 'y' to the undefined symbol LICHEN_COAP
/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/lichen/tests/coap_keys/prj.conf:19: warning: attempt to assign the value 'y' to the undefined symbol LICHEN_COAP_SERVER
/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/lichen/tests/coap_keys/prj.conf:22: warning: attempt to assign the value 'n' to the undefined symbol LICHEN_COAP_CLIENT
